entry.title: Re: Create CDS Entity in system 2 based on table in system 1
entry.content:
A way would be using external views
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/cds-view-accessing-external-system-remotely-in-s-4hana/ba-p/13510478

Another way Unmanaged RAP with Custom Views
https://software-heroes.com/en/blog/abap-rap-custom-entity-en

entry.title: SAP Discovery Center Innovations: AI Features, Terraform Automation, and More
entry.content:
Tomorrow is the first day of SAP TechEd 2024! It will kick-off as a virtual event and the anticipation and excitement is running incredibly high as we continue our last-minute preparations and rehearsals. If you haven’t had a chance to register, do so now!

Now on to the exciting stuff!

To further empower developers and technical users with advanced tools and expert guidance when adopting SAP products, I am very excited to introduce the following enhancements and updates to SAP Discovery Center.

Explore SAP Business AI Features

SAP Discovery Center has expanded! In addition to the existing three catalogs – SAP BTP Missions, Reference Architectures, and SAP BTP Services, it now offers an even broader range of content with the new SAP Business AI Feature Catalog. You can now browse the comprehensive list of transformative AI features and discover their practical applications and business value. Look around the catalog and dive into the individual features for more details and resources.

SAP Discovery Center

SAP Business AI Feature Catalog

Create Price and Value Estimations

For more insights into your projected AI investments, make use of the new cost and value-added information included in the AI Estimator. You can now calculate net savings for your AI features using a wizard to input your industry, employees, and revenue. This helps estimate costs, needed AI units, and net savings for your SAP AI projects.

AI Feature Estimator: Edit ParametersPrice & Value Estimate

Leverage Quick Account Setup with Terraform

Quick account setup is now seamlessly integrated into several key use cases. This feature simplifies the setup of business use cases from SAP Discovery Center missions, making the process easier and faster. You can easily find all missions featuring quick account setup on the Discovery Center homepage under the new Automated Account Setup Missions category in the Mission Catalog.

Automated Account Setup Missions

Advanced users can delve into the automation steps via the underlying Terraform configurations available on SAP’s public samples repository on GitHub. This fosters transparency and allows you to copy, adjust, and extend configurations, managing your SAP BTP infrastructure as code.

SAP BTP Mission: Quick Account Setup

Experience the Fresh Design + Discovery Center in a Nutshell

Enjoy the new color scheme and streamlined interface of our landing page. In addition, to the fresh look, we have curated a new ‘Discovery Center in a Nutshell’ infographic. Whether you are new to SAP Discovery Center or access it regularly, this infographic provides a consolidated visual view of the content, assets, and guidance provided. From exploration to evaluation, the website provides heaps of essential information and insights to allow you to make informed decisions. With the valuable implementation guidance, you will feel empowered to adopt our products and solutions with confidence.

Discovery Center in a Nutshell

Customize Your Workspace

After logging on, SAP Discovery Center becomes your space. You will immediately find your most recent activities and favorites. To tailor the homepage simply click, ‘Customize Your Space’ and select the content which is most relevant for you.

Customize Your Workspace

Customize Your Workspace Wizard

SAP BTP Solution Diagrams

Based on the SAP Fiori Horizon design system, a new guideline for SAP BTP Solution Diagrams has been released. The new guidelines support integrations, such as standard SAP BTP stencils, and content for draw.io and Lucidchart. Further integration with SAP LeanIX will enhance the seamless diagram creation and management. The newest set of SAP BTP service icons and examples are available on our central GitHub page.

Tailor Reference Architectures to Your Needs

Discover our latest reference architectures that offer best practices and standardized models for optimizing your SAP environment. These architectures simplify deployment and management and are now easily editable via the recently released download feature. The image is available for draw.io download allowing for immediate edits and changes using the integrated BTP stencils and content.

Download Reference Architecture

Discover Top Use Cases

Explore our latest SAP BTP use cases that address the most critical needs of our customers. These curated use cases demonstrate practical applications and showcase the tangible benefits of SAP solutions in real-world scenarios.

SAP Discovery Center at SAP TechEd

Join our SAP TechEd lecture and jumpstart sessions to see these innovations in action! You can find a summary of the activities and highlights in this blog post: SAP Discovery Center at SAP TechEd 2024: Sessions, Resources, and Highlights.

Thoughts?

We hope you find these innovations impactful and beneficial for your business. If you have any feedback, let me know in the comments or message me directly.

Enjoy the event! 😀

I'm not expert on HANA live expert, you may double check the help page.

entry.content:
Hi,
I have followed the below tutorial to expose my S/4HANA system fiori applications to SAP Workzone.
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-launchpad-federation-expose-content.html 
S/4HANA system details:
version : 2023
UI5:
Workzone:1.129.0
S/4HANA:1.120.0.

The apps are visible in Work-zone as tiles, but when I open , it gives "Internal Server error".
Not sure whether the workzone and S/4HANA UI5 versions should be same

1. Workzone

2. After opening the app

3. Console

entry.title: CAP UI not loading when opening from SAP Build WorkZone
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I have a cap application and UI application(built using annotation) deployed into SAP Build WorkZone.

Below is my UI application(highlighted in green - nsinvoiceui) visible in HTML5 Application section and it is loading properly when I open it from HTML5 Applications section.

However, the same application is not loading when I'm opening it from Build WorkZone. It stays in the below page.

When I checked in the developer tools, below is the error it was showing "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'message')" when loading ShellServices.

Note: This application was working fine yesterday(10-04-2024), surprisingly not today.

since the error is from standard library, I don't know What am I missing here.

I tried updating the Build workzone content, cleared cache and reopening the application. it didn't help me resolve.

Help me to resolve this issue.

Thanks in Advance!!

Best Regards

Boopalan M

SAP Business Application Studio 

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition 

SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment 

HTML5 SAP Cloud Application Programming Model  #flexible programming model-UI5

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 PDF Viewer Embedded not working on chrome
entry.content: I know the problem from some customers who have deactivated the internal PDF reader in their browser. Have a play around with the options.

entry.title: Re: ByDesign: Datasource for Production Confirmation incl...
entry.content: Dear Customer, You are correct, "Confirmation Journal" will not display confirmed scrap quantity of output product when there is no confirmed quantity of output product in the confirmation document meanwhile. You can go to SAP Business ByDesign Customer Influence Forum https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/886 to raise this improvement request. ByDesign development team will check all requests regularly and enroll those with more votes and bigger benefit into development backlog. Henry SAP Support

I have customized a new satus profile for header of my sales document in VA02.

I have three status, yo can see in attached document (resume, and current customizing).

But i don't want red arrow (change from READ to CANC).

Do you know how could customize this profile??

Thanks!!

Carlos.

entry.title: Re: solr admin page connection refused after upgrading to...
entry.content: this worked for me too, thank you!

entry.title: Re: Principal Propagation in SAP Integration Suite from external system to SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi, 

We are currently assessing Principal Propagation in Integration Suites to SuccessFactors. We need this for approval (approve and reject) interface from mobile app to SF--Principal Propagation is needed because SF OData for approve (approveWfRequest) and reject (rejectWfRequest) need the actual agent's user ID to approve/reject--otherwise it will be error (e.g. using technical user ID).

For this scenario, we are testing it with basic authentication, we maintained custom role collection for the SF approvers.

Then, we downloaded the certificate from BTP and created OAuth Client in SF as stated in Point 2 and 3.

After that, we maintained the Security Material from created API Key.

However, when we test the integration flow using Postman, we got this error.

Do you have any idea of this error's root cause? Or is there any missing configurations?

Thank you.

I would like to launch a navigation, when the users double click in Customer Reference field in VA02 (FIELD VBKD-BSTKD).

Do you know if i could have a badi, or exit for program inside??

Thanks!!

 

Carlos

entry.title: Re: Need Help Identifying the Best Processing Instruction...
entry.content:
OUTGOING PAYMENT

1. We have a supplier invoice The invoice is open, we have not yet registered payment of the invoice.

2. We pay the supplier invoice with ‘Transfer’ (I) payment method (GL account ‘57202021’)

3. Review the processing rule (automatic) created that it is not working

4. Load the bank statement and review the rule applied automatically 

the result is not the one shown because the bank statement line is not automatically cleared with any transaction.

5. Clear the bank statement line manually with the payment

Why is my automatic rule not able to find the payment and clear it?

entry.title: Re: Sales Pricing analysis Fiori App
entry.content: yes correct it is available via VA02 only and not as part of version 2 . This is how it is currenlt available and SAP is currently supporting both VA02 and Version 2 with the single business role

entry.title: Re: Setting "Reason&&" for Cancellation in Service Contract
entry.content:
Currently as of 2408 there is no such customizing available for service contract cancellation reason. 
Request you to raise a requirement using the customer influence portal

entry.title: Re: Date difference between current date and service cont...
entry.content:
Hi Srinivasa

Try this to get a feel for the numbers:

SELECT DATEDIFF(day,now(), serviceContract.endDate)
FROM ServiceContract serviceContract;

Looking at this in my demo environments data, I think this is what you need:

SELECT serviceContract
FROM ServiceContract serviceContract
WHERE DATEDIFF(day, serviceContract.endDate, now()) = 30;

Notice how swapping the dates changes the result from a negative to a positive number.

Best regards

    Raphael Barabas

entry.title: Re: SAP TRM: Separation of loan principal and interest payments
entry.content:
Because the cash flow 1100 Principal and 1200 Norminal interest are linked to different update types. It's easy for you to post to different GL accounts for principal posing and interest payment posting. I simulate your case in our public cloud internal system. 

Simulation in internal system:

  1. Create an intercompany transaction of 55I;

 

Check cash flows:

 

 

1100 Principal Increase

1200 Norminal interest

1120 Final repayment

Please ignore 1905 and 1906

2. TBB1 do the posting for Principal;

 

GL account for principal: 12021200 Short Term Investments, Affiliated, Consolid.(TRM)

3. TBB1 Post interest

For received cash interest, the GL account is 70200200 Interest Income, Affiliated, Consolidation(TRM)

This way the Principal and interest payment are using different GL accounts.

In public cloud we use different account symbol for Principal(1) and interest income (4.1.1). You may refer below settings and do the adjustment accordingly to meet your specific requirement. 

IMG Settings:             

KONTENFINDUNG Define Account Determination for Treasury and Risk Management

Cash Flow

Update type

Posting spec

Posting spec description

Posting Key(D)

Account Symbol(D)

Posting Key(C)

Account Symbol(C)

1100 Principal Increase

MM1100-

11100

Position to Bank Clearing

40

1

40

3

1200 Norminal interest

MM1200+

13100

Bank Clearing to Interest Revenue

40

3

50

4.1.1

 

 

Posting specs:

 

 

 

Assignment of G/L Accounts:

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud SDK (Javascript) does not generate bound ac...
entry.content: Hi Andre, yes I also think that this is more of an incompleteness than some special feature..

entry.title: Re: 🇩🇪 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content:
As per the comment from @noravonthenen

"... to close registration now and add everyone else after this to the waiting list,"

Any subsequent registration by clicking "Yes" to the "Will you be attending?" will automatically add you to the waiting list.
Once a reminder email is sent out, any remaining open spots will be allocated to those on the waiting list.

entry.title: Re: 🇩🇪 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content: Great! Thank you so much for the answer!

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge - Full-Stack - Project Set-up and Database Modeling (Week 1)
Check if a cell is "Open" in SAC Script with IF statement
entry.content:
Hi all

I want to check the DataLockingState of a cell with an "IF statement".

var lockstate = tbl_locktable.getPlanning().getDataLocking().getState(sel);
if (sv_lockstate === "Open" ) {
....
}

Because "automatical conversion is not supported" in SAC I would like to convert the string "Open"  to type "DataLockingState"?  How can I do this?

Thank you for any help

Best Regards

Frank

using the " performed date & time " column

entry.title: Re: Move data only to first product in the hierarchy belo...
entry.content: Thankyou for your response!

entry.title: Re: Using table alias in order by of window expressions - ABAP open SQL
entry.content:
Thank you for the reply @Marian_Zeis. The above syntax will work perfectly as long as only one table has EBELN field in the Table join.

However, if both Table-A & Table-B has EBELN field, then the system throws the error

'The column name or association "EBELN" is ambiguous, which means it occurs in multiple tables'.

To overcome this, I provide alias name of the table to the field EBELN [Ex: a~ebeln].

Example

FIRST_VALUE( ebeln ) OVER( PARTITION BY a~belnr, a~rbukrs, a~gjahr
ORDER BY a~ebeln DESCENDING ) AS ebeln

Then the system throws the below error

"~" is not allowed here. " ) " is expected.

Any leads will be appreciated. TIA.

 

Regards,

Prabha.

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAP FIORI Tools - Application Modeler
entry.content: Hi all, a new version of the Application Wizard (version 1.16.7) has now been released to the VSCode marketplace. With this version, you can upgrade to VSCode 1.94 without any issue with Fiori tools. Regards, Ian.

entry.title: Re: 🔵 Integrating Generative AI in SAP S/4HANA with ISLM
entry.content: The link to get the slides (https://dam.sap.com/mac/app/cs/event/d0313dbb989e2dd8f2a94e2d0777a7801957f7f4 is not working for customers. Is there an alternative for customers ?

entry.title: Re: Using table alias in order by of window expressions - ABAP open SQL
entry.content:
yeah, its not easy, i cant try now, but do subquery work?

SELECT
    subquery~laufd,
    subquery~laufi,
    subquery~chect,
    subquery~zbukr,
    subquery~pridt,
    subquery~lifnr,
    subquery~kunnr,
    subquery~belnr,
    subquery~bldat,
    subquery~rwbtr,
    subquery~sgtxt,
    subquery~waers,
    subquery~voidd,
    subquery~shkzg,
    subquery~vblnr,
    subquery~zwels,
    subquery~hbkid,
    subquery~hktid,
    subquery~rzawe,
    subquery~text2,
    subquery~xblnr,
    subquery~zfbdt,
    subquery~zbd1t,
    subquery~zbd2t,
    subquery~zbd3t,
    subquery~dmbtr,
    subquery~zpstl,
    subquery~zort1,
    subquery~zstra,
    subquery~zpfac,
    subquery~landx,
    subquery~bezei,
    subquery~xbanc,
    subquery~bancd,
    FIRST_VALUE( ebeln ) OVER( PARTITION BY belnr, rbukrs, gjahr
                               ORDER BY ebeln DESCENDING ) AS ebeln
FROM (
    SELECT
        p~laufd,
        p~laufi,
        chect,
        p~zbukr,
        pridt,
        p~lifnr,
        p~kunnr,
        rp~belnr,
        rp~bldat,
        p~rwbtr,
        b~sgtxt,
        rp~waers,
        p~voidd,
        rp~shkzg,
        p~vblnr,
        zwels,
        p~hbkid,
        p~hktid,
        p~rzawe,
        text2,
        xblnr,
        rp~zfbdt,
        rp~zbd1t,
        rp~zbd2t,
        rp~zbd3t,
        rp~dmbtr,
        zpstl,
        zort1,
        zstra,
        zpfac,
        landx,
        bezei,
        xbanc,
        bancd,
        a~ebeln
    FROM payr AS p
    INNER JOIN regup AS rp
      ON  p~laufd = rp~laufd
      AND p~laufi = rp~laufi
      AND p~lifnr = rp~lifnr
      AND p~kunnr = rp~kunnr
      AND p~vblnr = rp~vblnr
    INNER JOIN bseg AS b
      ON  rp~belnr = b~belnr
      AND rp~bukrs = b~bukrs
      AND rp~gjahr = b~gjahr
      AND rp~buzei = b~buzei
    LEFT OUTER JOIN acdoca AS a
      ON  rp~belnr = a~belnr
      AND rp~bukrs = a~rbukrs
      AND rp~gjahr = a~gjahr
      AND a~rldnr = @LC_01
      AND a~blart = @LC_re
      AND a~ebeln <> @space
) AS subquery
INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_check).

entry.title: Invisible values and lines in VizFrame when value is over 1000
entry.content:
Two strange (related) problems:

1. I'm using a combined chart VizFrame, and I find that when I put the pattern as "noFill" for one of the columns, if the value is above 1000, then the entire column is invisible. 

2. When adding a line to the chart, if the value is consistently 1000 (or more) across the entire timeframe, the entire chart is not rendered. I get an error of "Cannot read properties of null (reading 'y')".

 

Any ideas?

entry.title: Re: How do we create a variable on WEBI that calculates i...
entry.content:
see my answer to similar question

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-calculate-the-time-difference-between-the-same-timestamp-if-less/qaq-p/13850887/comment-id/4881743#M4881743

entry.title: Quick hacks: Displaying fields
entry.content:
Like most developers, I'm very lazy and want to do things the neat, quick and cool way whenever I can. Today's quick hack is showing you how I very quickly display the fields of a data resource, whether it be on a list or on a detail page.

This hack is specifically for those text or number type fields that you don't want to style in any specific way, but want to just show with a label and the content below.

Example of fields with label and value

Whenever I need to do this, I take the Object I want to display and do a nifty formula using MAP, KEYS and LOOKUP. The following example is done in a situation like above when the Object I want to display is repeated.

 

MAP(KEYS(repeated.current), {key: item, value: LOOKUP(repeated.current, item)})

 

If you don't want all of the fields displayed (or want to display some fields in a different way), you can omit those fields using OMIT_KEYS formula, e.g.

MAP(KEYS(OMIT_KEYS(repeated.current, ["id", "image"])), {key: item, value: LOOKUP(repeated.current, item)})

In addition, you could of course for example style the field names (e.g. capitalizing with CAPITALIZE).

Hope this helps or gives you ideas for how to use formulas in your apps!

entry.title: Re: creating a Variable on WEBI to count number of patien...

entry.title: Planned Orders list of the last MRP run
entry.content:
Hello, experts.
In my scenario, MRP is scheduled in the background and runs once a day; after the MRP run, I just need the list of planned orders generated by the last MRP run.

The reason for this is that planners used to convert priority planned orders on the same day, while lower priority planned orders remained unchanged. So, after the MRP run, if I check the manage planned orders app, I'll see the lower priority planned orders as well.

In COOIS, when I run the report, I don't see any data in the created on column. Is there a way to meet the requirement.

entry.title: Re: 🔵 Integrating Generative AI in SAP S/4HANA with ISLM
entry.content: @Cocquerel, I'm unable to access the slides.

entry.title: Re: PaPM function doesn't get deployed at first, and only...
entry.content:
Hello Leonardo,

I understand that you are encountering this issue when executing PaPM transactions. To fix the issue, kindly follow the steps below:

1. Transaction SICF: Please make sure that node WDR_APC is activated
2. Web Dynpro application WD_GLOBAL_SETTING: Please make sure that the parameter WDNOTIFICATIONSERVICE is set to value PUSH. You can use this parameter also as URL Parameter.
3. SAP Note 2748620 - Requirements for Notification Service through WebSocket communication protocol

If still does not work, incident can be created and assign to Webdynpro component BC-WD-ABA-RUN.

Hope this helps!

Best regards,
Kevin

entry.title: Re: SAP Android SDK - offline odata - batch CUD operations
entry.content:
Hi @yohann_weberfr,

The SAP BTP SDK for Android provides specific classes for submitting batch requests to the backend. Check out following guide: https://help.sap.com/doc/f53c64b93e5140918d676b927a3cd65b/Cloud/en-US/docs-en/guides/features/backend-connectivity/android/using-odata-api.html#batch-processing 

Best regards,

Robin

entry.title: Re: 🇩🇪 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core

entry.title: Re: APM - Issues with triggering and evaluating rules
entry.content: Hi JeffVandevelde,

entry.title: Accrual Process directly FI
entry.content: S4HANA Public Cloud product does not have Accrual Engine. In one of our projects, rent invoices will come from the RE module and I need to periodise it from the FI module. What can I do for this, do you have a suggestion? There are short-term and long-term differentiations in country localisation. In other words, I need to differentiate the amount found during the year and the amounts to be found in the coming years.

entry.title: Re: Transporting content in SAP Build Apps (SAP Cloud Transport Management integration)
entry.content:
Hi, thank you for the blog, in my projects i need to transport the SAP Build backend, what should i use instead of Transport management.

I need to Transport from DEV to Test and i can`t transport Backend. I can only use CTMS for transporting staff from DEV to TEST.

Best regards

Atakan

entry.title: Re: APM - Issues with triggering and evaluating rules
entry.content:
Hi JeffVandevelde,
This sounds like an issue our support colleagues should take a look at. Kindly create a support case using component APM-AH-RLS via the SAP Support Portal.
Thanks a lot and sorry for any inconvenience caused.
Best,
Jan Patrick

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Visual Cloud Functions - "RBAC: access denied" on retrive, create
entry.content: I tried from scratch and it works for me. What landscape and region are you using? If trial, this user is the one that created the trial account and exists in the Custom IDP?

entry.title: Re: Internal behaviour of dump marker and rsync marker in...
entry.content: Hi Dilip, the internal behaviour with dump marker should be similar for MSA/WSB if I'm right. Regarding the data in queue, you can check this: "For each DSI that resumes with the skip to resync marker parameter, the DSI outbound queue records in the Replication Server system log that DSI has received the resync marker and also records that from that point forward, DSI rejects committed transactions until it receives the dump database marker." https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_REPLICATION_SERVER/62f3e3a6d49342cf9b7d72ee726a48b0/fd0bedadbd1c1014b1beabd7f2f84de7.html?locale=en-US&q=resync+marker

entry.title: Re: SAP Shutdown Turnaround and Outages for Energy and Natural Resources Industries - Part 1

Is SAP STO solution released for public? If not what is the road-map?

Best Regards,

Rajendra Pandey

entry.title: Hyperlink in ADOBE form
entry.content:
please help me with the hyperlink in ADOBE forms.

I have tried following methods but no luck.

entry.title: change the payment conditions
entry.content: Dear colleagues, I have a question about the relationship between a debtor (VD02) and a maintenance contract (VA42) in SAP. When I change the name of a debtor in VD02, this name also changes directly in existing maintenance contracts. But when I change the payment conditions of a debtor in VD02, for example from 0019 to 0313, the payment conditions do NOT change in the existing maintenance contracts. Can this be set up so that a change of payment conditions is adopted in all existing maintenance contracts for this debtor?

entry.title: Re: FocusBuild - TOCs not imported immediately
entry.content: Hi Shawn, thanks for your help. I took a look at transaction type SM1J in SM34->AIC_SETTINGS2 (there are no ZXXX transaction types in our systems). Under E004, the action is COPY_ALL_ENH. So TOC should be imported automatically. I will open a support ticket with SAP after getting some more information about the RFCs which show this behaviour.

entry.title: Re: FocusBuild - TOCs not imported immediately
entry.content: Hi Shawn, thanks for your help. I took a look at transaction type SM1J in SM34->AIC_SETTINGS2 (there are no ZXXX transaction types in our systems). Under E004, the action is COPY_ALL_ENH. So TOC should be imported automatically. I will open a support ticket with SAP after getting some more information about the RFCs which show this behaviour. Regards Andre

entry.title: Re: Hello SAP WORLD,
entry.content: enjoy the content 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant -...
entry.content:
Welcome Felicia!

One piece of advice from me (former consultant for S4 Sales in Public and prior to that in on-prem) is even though all that you'll need to obtain the certification is in the Learning Journey, I've found the book 'Configuring SAP ERP Sales & Distribution' invaluable through all my years working with sales. It shows the sample business scenarios that are relevant to the topic (eg. why do you need a proof of delivery at all?) and the configuration options in an on-prem system behind that. While some of that configuration isnt available to modify in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, it's still very useful to know the driving mechanic and what it does (e.g. item categories). Good luck!

entry.title: Lessons from the SAP Advisory Council for Waste & Recycling annual meeting
entry.content:
On September 25th  and 26th took place in Walldorf the annual presential meeting  of the SAP Advisory Council for Waste and Recycling is a,  by invitation only, a select group of companies  willing to collaborate in an open environment with SAP. With more of 25 editions, the Advisory Council is a well established forum whose members drive their companies digital vision and stablish a community beyond the physical meetings with the following purposes.

​- Feedback and validation

​- Collaboration

​- Communication

​- Product adoption information exchange

 ​Image:  SAP Advisory Council for Waste & Recycling meeting atendees

​This year edition attended more than 25 delegates from 9 companies plus  Prologa, in the condition of developer of strategic industry cloud solutions for the Waste and Recycling industry and Gruler & Cleve Consulting  which accepted the invitation to share their experiences and help conducting a design thinking workshop.

Agenda for this year was divided in three parts:  product strategy and development updates, ideation workshop on Artificial Intelligence and conversion experiences into S/4HANA.

​SAP  product strategy and development updates were presented by Solution Management and Product Management teams (Image:  Uwe Zachmann and Somik Sarkar, Waste industry responsibles from Product Management team) which offered their respective perspectives, this is from extending the scope of current solution into the recycling part of the value chain to a detailed description and demonstration of the new developments released for the SAP for Waste & Recycling  part of S/4HANA plus insights of the ongoing and future developments.  All these updates provided were explained in the context of the overall SAP product portfolio strategy around RISE offering, where Artificial Intelligence capabilities will play a key role.  In this sense, and as an introduction for the later comprehensive ideation session on this subject, a PoC of Jule showing a use case for the waste collection process was shown.

​Prologa presented very interested and relevant updates as well.  Of special relevance has been the introduction of Mr. Christoph Hillmann as Prologa VP for Circular Economy & CoDevelopment who made a vibrant presentation of their product strategy and the ongoing development roadmap for their components, with special focus in the Order Planning and Dispatching solution plus a spark of their updated go – to – market strategy which will include an event next november   

 

​Image:  Ideation session

​Second part of the meeting has been an ideation workshop on AI can help to develop waste & recycling business. Session was brillianty conducted by Isabel Creuznacher from Gruler & Cleve Consulting jointly with Henán Sendra from the Center of Expertise - CoE of SAP BTP.

​ Part one

  • Short Intro of objective WS
  • Inspiration overview:  AI for SAP
  • Intro Design Thinking as Method for WS

​Part two

  • Teambuilding
  • Exercise Needfinding Journey (participants):  discuss the journey and define the problems
  • Group presentations main pain points (participants)

 

​Part three

  • Split teams according to problem area
  • Intro Ideation Session
  • Ideation Sessions for use cases

oBrainstorming / “crazy 8” (individual)

oSelect for the best 10 ideas (group)

  • Selection of idea (ideation matrix for feasibility)
  • Wrap-up

​Third part of the meeting was dedicated to the conversion experiences of SAP ECC systems into S4HANA.  A very big thank you to our co-chairs Roman Aiyer from WBD - Duisburg and Matthias Reich from Prezero for the great feedback on their S4HANA conversion projects with the great help of Mr. Jürgen Krist.

​.We are confident that more successful and interesting sessions will come in the future. Noticing that members play an active part in the orchestration and conduction of activities is a positive signal.  For all involved SAP departments, the value of the Advisory Council is undisputed.

 

​

entry.title: Announcing the Water Resilience Conference: Cape Town, Southafrica, November 13th – 14th
entry.content:
​We are pleased to announce an insights session on innovative strategies and technologies to enhance water resilience and drive digital transformation in water and waste water services companies in Africa. This session is in collaboration with our global alliance partner EY, which brings leading knowledge, experience and global expertise in this sector

​Water resilience, this is the ability of water and wastewater companies to support and mitigate the effects of disasters, infrastructure challenges, population growth and the growing number of unpredictable challenges mainly due to climate change. Companies are required to implement strategies and technologies that ensure a continuous and reliable supply of clean water and secure a healthy enviroment, even in the face of disruptions.

​This includes the use of smart metering platforms, intelligent reporting and satellite imaging to monitor and manage water resources effectively. By building resilience, government/water companies can enhance their capacity to adapt to changing conditions, protect public health and support sustainable development.

 ​Source:  FARYS, PIDPA and De Watergroep: “Digitale Watermeter. The power of Smart Metering”. Utiliteis Conference, Seville, 2024

​Sessions are designed to bring  inspirational use cases and open a discusión among participants. Current confirmed tracks will be: 

  • City of Cape Town - How a Smart Metering Platform will ensure water resilience in the City of Cape Town.
  • SAP - : Building resilience in water companies; evolving to data-driven insights and decision-making using a smart water platform
  • FARYS - WaterUnie : How Intelligent Reporting ensures evidence-led decision making at a European water company
  • EY Africa and EY USA: How Satellite Imaging supports water resilience strategies
  • SAP - Smart Energy and Water Platform demonstration.  What does this mean to a water utility company? How to derive value from latest technology solutions
  • SAP - Developing a customer centric culture. What is the purpose, benefits and challenges. What is the impact on IT landscapes at water utilities?
  • EY Africa - : Government & Infrastructure topic – Asset Management as a discipline – what does good look like?
  • SAP - and EY Africa : Ageing Infrastructure – Intelligent asset management: how digital innovations are transforming field operations and rehabilitation investment strategies
  • FARYS - WaterUnie : Holistic approach for asset management: Funding/Investment, Field execution and Spatial integration

 ​Sessions will take place at EY Cape Town offices and Bellville CoCT Water Department. We are looking forward to share these insights with attendees while exploring and learning from their experiences in what promises to be an enlightening and engaging discussion. For any queries you may have please reach out to Hannes Venter hannes.venter@sap.com or myself.

​Looking forward to see you in Cape Town!

entry.title: Re: Internal behaviour of dump marker and rsync marker in...
entry.content:
Hi Tony,

My whole intention behind mentioning/specifying the work 'resync' is to tell that synchronizing the out of synchronized 'RDB' but not the method to use the option 'resync marker' in RepAgent and DSI to synchronize.

1. In WSB whenever we want to synchronize the 'RDB', we drop and recreate the connection. Once we do this "enable replication marker" will be written into PDB's transaction log. After this step when a dump is triggered a 'dump marker' will be written into the PDB's log which will then carry forward to the Replication Server System. The behaviour applies to MSA (Database Level)as well when a subscription is defined with dump marker?
2. Coming to my second question, if we don't purge(because we can't mark the RS into standalone) the OBQ of the effected RDB before we synchronize(just suspending the DSI) how the existing data in the OBQ of the effected RDB will be handled?

Regards,
Dilip Voora

entry.title: Re: SAP and Arm64 version of Windows 11 with Prism emulat...
entry.content:
Hi Sven,

in regards to ABAP development tools for Eclipse: Do you know our ADT installation guide? It is our official document. It contains a section with the requirements.

Does the document helps you?

Kind regards,

Wolfgang

entry.title: Re: Embrace Defect Corrections with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello Thomas,

You can refer to the SAP Cloud ALM Road Map to see which features are planned for release with the timeline - https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800002513&range=CURRENT-LAST#Q4%202024
Road Map is being updated on a regular basis by Product Management. 

Stay curios! 🙂

entry.title: Delivery Address sequence
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In delivery address sequence we have Ordering party (order partner) and Goods recipient (order partner). Can you please let me know what does Ordering party (order partner) and Goods recipient (order partner) address refers to.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Re: How to Set Up the Email Notification for Flexible Workflow in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello 

I've created a flexible workflow for WS02000029, I've copy the following email templated into my company name space.

/***/SD_SLS_CMR_APPROVAL_EMAIL

/***/SD_SLS_CMR_DEADLINE_EMAIL

/***/SD_SLS_CMR_REJECT_EMAIL_T

/***/SD_SLS_CMR_RELEASE_EMAIL_

/***/SD_SLS_CMR_REWORK_EMAIL_T

/***/02000029_COMPLETE_NEGATIV

/***/02000029_COMPLETE_POSITIV

/***/SWF_CRT_NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS

When the requestor creates a credit memo, the email goes to the Approver as well as the deadline email that is /***/SD_SLS_CMR_APPROVAL_EMAIL and /***/SD_SLS_CMR_DEADLINE_EMAIL.

The problem is when the Approver Approves/Rejects or Reworks, theres no email sent out to the requestor.I've check SOST and theres no email in the queue, email addresses are maintained for the requestors in SU01.

The 2 decision tasks 02000054 and 02000055 are binded for WS02000029 in transaction PFTC.

There workflow works fine, its just the emails that dont get sent out.

  Is there some steps that I'm missing somewhere?

We are using S4/HANA 2023 on premise, SAP FIORI for S4HANA 2023

Thanks

Adhil

entry.title: 3rd Latin America Executive Value Network (EVN) for Water and Waste Water Services companies
entry.content:
Current edition of the Executive Value Network (EVN) pursues the consolidation to what is an regional knowledge sharing forum focused into the analysis and discussion of digital transformation use cases of Water and Waste Water companies with the purpose to get valuable insights from peers and explore how to improve inefficient traditional processes while embracing new relevant technologies. 

 Image: EVN previous meetings in Bucaramanga (2022) and Cartagena de Indias (2023)

​Success of previous years EVN editions have motivated to meet this year in Barranquilla, hosted by Triple A which is the local water company.  Latin America EVN also has inspired other territories of the region to explore digital transformation cases in the water sector and network among peers and last may  there was a similar event in Mexico, hosted by hosted by the Servicios de Agua y Drenaje de Monterrey (Mexico)  where you can find a summary here 

 

​Sessions are designed to bring  inspirational use cases to open a discusión among participants. For current edition tracks Will be

  • How an intelligent water management platform assure water and waste water services companies resilience to adress corrent and future challenges.
  • Developing a Customer first culture:  purpose, benefits and challenges. How its application impacts corporate IT landscape.
  • Technical asset Management as a discipline:  which are the benefits of efficiency? How Innovation are trasforming field work and investment strategies
  • How a data driven policy assures transparency, resource optimization and intelligent decisions

Sessions will be complemented with a site visit to Barranquilla's new Marllorquin Swamp Ecopark 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

​Thanks to our partners  Misait and Smart Energy and Water – SEW (links), the Executive Networking Dinner help attendees to join an executive community that extends beyond the conference, gaining knowledge from peers and other companies, partners and vendors.

​For those interested to join and take part in our discussions we have set up a registration website where updates on agenda and other useful information is as well  https://events.sap.com/lac/evn-agua-alcantarillado-lac-north-2024/es/home

​Looking forward to see you in Barranquilla!

entry.title: Re: RAP, create child entities based on static factory ac...

entry.title: Re: Display hierarchies in BW4 for authorization relevant...
entry.content: Unfortunately this does not work as expected... Once the user is authorized for the root node, the user sees values for complete world. This is not what we want. He should still be able to see values for his company code only. Value and hierarchy authorizations work always in combination.

entry.title: Re: RAP, create child entities based on static factory ac...
entry.content: Thank you @Kangkana. I will correct it . Can you also please check if Modify entities is a valid syntax. Since the scenario is to create child entity independent of Parent entity and I am getting error that create child entity is not possible.

entry.title: Re: Infotype 0001An exception with the type CX_SY_DYN_CALL_ILLEGAL_TYPE occurred, but was neither ha
entry.content: It actually showing this error for some users. PA/PD integration is turned on PLOGI ORGAS. However, If I turn off PA/PD, the error doesn't appear. Exactly I am not able to catch the issue.

entry.title: Initial value of 0FISCPER is replaced wrongly
entry.content:
Hi, after upgrade to BW7.50 SP029 we are faced with the problem, that our exit-variable using initial query proposed value "#" is replaced to "000000". That leads to an error in our coding as it is not interpreted as initial value nor as "#" anymore.

Does anyone have an idea?

  METHOD bi_f_ce_za_0fiscper_006.
* Deklaration
    DATA:
      ls_var_range LIKE LINE OF it_var_range,
      ls_range     TYPE rrrangesid,
      lv_bool      TYPE i.

* Initialisierung
    CLEAR ls_var_range.
    CLEAR ls_range.

* Aus dem Intervall Periode/Geschäftsjahr die Differenz der Anzahl Perioden ermitteln
    READ TABLE it_var_range WITH KEY vnam = cv_bi_ma_i_o_0fiscper_001 INTO ls_var_range.

    IF ls_var_range-low eq '#'
    OR ls_var_range-low IS INITIAL.
      lv_bool = 0.
    ELSE.
      lv_bool = 1.
    ENDIF.

    CLEAR ls_range.
    ls_range-sign  = 'I'.
    ls_range-opt  = 'EQ'.

    ls_range-low = lv_bool.

    APPEND ls_range TO et_range.

  ENDMETHOD.

 

Regards,

Peter

entry.title: Re: Sync & Use SWIFT Code (Bank Data) from SAP ECC to SAP Ariba-SLP via WebServices and vice ver
entry.content:
I am facing a similar issue. The standard mapping proposed for SWIFT Code is vendor.bankInfos.bankAccountExternalID but this is incorrect.

Mapping the SWIFT code to this field will prevent registering a second bank account with the same bank (and same SWIFT Code) in the supplier profile in SAP S/4.

Can anyone suggest the correct mapping for SWIFT Code?

 

Thanks

Smeeta

entry.title: How to add a post on the Supply Chain community
entry.content: Hi everyone, sorry new here and struggling to post a question on the Supply Chain community?

entry.title: Intercompany purchase for materials with account assignment or Lean services
entry.content:
Hi All

I'm in a greenfield implementation for S4Hana Cloud private.

In this project is required to implement an intercompany process starting in the purchase order but for materials with account assignment or Lean services (this is not possible in advanced intercompany).

For Cloud public edition this scenario exist: Scenario Billing of Costs Between Affiliated Companies (3ZB) but i can't find similar guide for Cloud private.

Can anyone share any implementation guide or documentation about this process?

entry.title: Re: Using two different versions of SAP B1 Clients on sam...
entry.content:
Hi Kbasher, 

The installation of two different B1 client patches on one machine is not supported. The installer will ask to uninstall the previous version as first.

Potentially you can copy and use client binaries from <SOFTWARE-PACKAGE>\Packages.x64\Client\Program Files 64\SAP\SAP Business One\SAP Business One.exe for test purposes.

Please note that the registration of libraries is not done in this option (in compared to installation) and can cause some issues for example in CR, DIAPI, Addons.

Best regards,
Darius

Thank you,

Anagha Deshmukh

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account (SAP Universal ID) and getting started in the community
entry.content: Hello my name is Fatma, I am a woman from Egypt, and I am deeply interested in the SAP FI module as it plays a crucial role in streamlining financial processes and ensuring accurate reporting. I am eager to expand my knowledge and skills in this area to contribute to efficient financial operations.

entry.title: Re: IAS as central user management system
entry.content: You can configure multiple corporate IdPs with IAS. Additionally, you can integrate Azure and also use user management within IAS. This setup is particularly useful for exceptionbal cases, where a user does not exist in Azure but still needs access to your applications.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear David Chaviano,

I hope this message finds you well. My name is Ali Furqan, and I am currently working with a Dubai-based organization that is in the process of implementing SAP ERP solutions. With over two years of experience in SAP MM consulting, I take pride in being part of a dedicated implementation team and contributing to the success of our projects.

Recently, I completed the course "Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sourcing and Procurement," which has deepened my understanding of SAP’s cutting-edge technology. I believe that obtaining professional certification is essential for my growth and for providing even greater value to my team and clients. Therefore, I am highly motivated to pursue certification to formalize my expertise and ensure I remain aligned with the latest industry standards.

In light of this, I would like to kindly request your support in securing a free certification attempt. I am confident that this opportunity will greatly enhance my skills and enable me to make a more significant contribution to my company’s ongoing and future SAP projects.

I sincerely appreciate your time and consideration, and I look forward to your response.

Best regards,
Ali Furqan

Can you help me in this ?

entry.title: Re: Phantom Indicator is selected in Material master and...
entry.content:
Hello Kamal, Could you please check validity BOM and Production version, I am assuming Production version may fall outside BOM validity date. To help you better, could you please share BOM and PV screenshot.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP S/4HANA Data into SAP HANA Cloud Using SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
@DJSmith : At the moment it would push the data directly into HANA Cloud an dif you want to push the data to another HANA engine, you would need to selecta adifferent target connection, e.g. HANA Data lake Files in case you want to push the data into SAP HANA data lake files.
HANA Data Lake relational engine is currently not supported as target in replication flows.

Kind regards,

Daniel

entry.title: Calculated form rating & overall form rating should be separate for mid-year & year-end evaluations.
entry.content:
Customer Expectation- The customer conducts a mid-year performance cycle and aims to document the overall form rating separately for both mid-year and year-end reviews. Each KPI (goal) rating should be included in the summary section, along with the calculated form rating and overall ratings for both the mid-year and year-end evaluations.

Problem Statement- In the SuccessFactors PMGM module, there is only one standard Summary section, which means we cannot have separate calculated and overall form ratings for mid-year and year-end evaluations. Additionally, we are unable to provide distinct standard ratings for each KPI (goal) for both mid-year and year-end assessments.

Proposed Solution- To meet the requirements, we can maintain standard ratings for each KPI (goal) during the mid-year evaluation step. This will allow us to generate a calculated form rating in the summary section, along with a manually entered overall form rating. Each KPI rating will also be displayed in the summary. Below the summary section, we can create a custom section titled "Mid-Year Overall Rating," featuring two text boxes: 1) Mid-Year Calculated Rating and 2) Mid-Year Overall Rating. Users can enter the calculated rating in the first box and the overall rating in the second box to keep a record of both.

When the performance cycle progresses to year-end, users will see the same rating boxes where they entered the mid-year ratings for each KPI (goal), but in editable mode. They can overwrite the mid-year ratings with year-end ratings, which will generate a calculated rating for the year-end review. Users will also have the option to provide an overall form rating for year-end. The summary section will display the updated ratings provided by the user for each KPI (goal) at year-end. Additionally, the mid-year calculated and overall form ratings entered during the mid-year review will remain in the "Mid-Year Overall Rating" section for reference.

Is there anything else we can do to meet the customer requirement?

entry.title: Re: Number of patients how did the lab twice
entry.content: the formlua works with me, but the issue is that. When i try to count number of patients who did 2 labs, 0 has been shown. the used formula is =Count (How did 2 labs)

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP S/4HANA Data into SAP HANA Cloud Using SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
@qisu : When using HANA Cloud as target in Replication Flows, costs of Premium Outbound INtegration (=POI) dod not apply in this scenario and you only need to consider the data integration / execution hours as part of the SAP Datasphere sizing.
The pro's and cons depend also a little bit on the individual use case you are planning to implement, e.g. Replication Flows compared to HANA SDI, do not need any DP Agent that would need to be deployed & maintained by the customer and also offer additional target systems & source systems.

entry.title: Re: Excel connection to SAP failed after GUI 8.00 Update
entry.content: Hi, I am getting the same error. Since upgrading to SAP GUI 8 in 64bit (Office is on 64bit already) the macros are failing with above mentioned error message. I have alreay added wdtaocx.ocx to the references in VBA, but this has not solved the issue. Is there any update on how to fix this?

Soma

Can you please share the title of the relating roadmap item?

Ciao Riccardo

entry.title: Re: Insert text type and content in notes tab in Freight...
entry.content: @MuditJain See my updated answer with a test report to create texts for a freight order
